text.title: Cognitive Inclusion Design Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces.

example.note: Missing patterns, settings, wcag_mapping; surface alone is not a spec.

list.item: A settings object missing any of focus_mode/dyslexia_font/reduced_motion/extended_time/plain_language.
A flow >3 steps without chunking pattern.
Plain-language toggle absent when reading level >Grade 8.
